_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for The 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Playbook. {palette} resolves at runtime.

seven-step-architecture.prompt:
Editorial information graphic showing the 7-step low-ticket funnel architecture as a vertical descending flow. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 7-Step 2026 Funnel Architecture"
SUBTITLE: "Without bumps and OTOs, the math fails. Standalone tripwire cannot cover paid acquisition."

7 stacked horizontal steps connected by descending arrows. Each step is a horizontal rounded rectangle, slightly narrower than the one above, suggesting a funnel narrowing.

Step 1 (top, widest): "01 LEAD MAGNET (free) on squeeze page"
Step 2: "02 TRIPWIRE $7 to $97 priced as impulse"
Step 3: "03 ORDER BUMP $7 to $27 at checkout"
Step 4: "04 OTO (One-Time Offer) $97 to $497 immediately post-purchase"
Step 5: "05 DOWNSELL at lower price if OTO declined"
Step 6: "06 CONTINUITY $27 to $97/mo for long-term revenue"
Step 7 (bottom, narrowest): "07 BACKEND HIGH-TICKET $1,500 to $10K (coaching, DFY, retainer)"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Step numbers (01, 02, etc): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, large
- Step content: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Step rectangles: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo fills
- Connecting arrows: thin bright cyan downward arrows between steps

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no money imagery, no checkout cart icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K funnel architecture graphic.

funnel-math-full-stack.prompt:
Editorial worksheet showing full-stack low-ticket funnel math (tripwire + bump + OTO + continuity) with calculated revenue per lead. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Funnel Math: Full Stack vs Standalone Tripwire"

Two columns: SCENARIO A (standalone, losing) and SCENARIO B (full stack, breakeven+).

LEFT COLUMN labeled: SCENARIO A: $47 STANDALONE TRIPWIRE
Lines:
"CPL: $4"
"Tripwire CR: 5%"
"AOV: $47"
"Refund rate: 14%"
"Net rev/lead: $2.02"
"VERDICT: Losing $1.98 per lead"

RIGHT COLUMN labeled: SCENARIO B: $47 + $17 BUMP + $197 OTO + CONTINUITY
Lines:
"CPL: $4"
"Tripwire CR: 5%, Bump 35% at +$5.95, OTO 12% at +$23.64"
"Effective AOV: $76.59"
"Refund rate: 14%"
"Continuity 18% take, $27/mo, 4-month avg LTV"
"Net rev/lead: $4.26"
"VERDICT: Breakeven on front-end + continuity by day 90"

BOTTOM PANEL: "Backend $497 to $2K at 1-2% take rate is pure profit."

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Column labels: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 (uppercase)
- Lines: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Net rev numbers ($2.02, $4.26): massive bold sans-serif, bright cyan
- VERDICT lines: bold sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white panel
- Bottom panel: small italic medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white panel

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.
COLUMN BACKGROUNDS: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no money imagery.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K math worksheet.

pricing-threshold-ladder.prompt:
Editorial information graphic showing the 2026 low-ticket pricing thresholds as an ascending price ladder. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Price Thresholds That Still Work in 2026"

8 ascending steps from lowest at the bottom to highest at the top, each labeled with the price and the psychological threshold name.

From bottom to top:
"$7 - Coffee threshold, pure impulse"
"$17 - Bump territory"
"$27 - Lunch threshold, mini-courses"
"$47 - Book threshold, standard tripwire 2026"
"$97 - No-CFO-approval threshold, B2B"
"$197 - Standard OTO mode"
"$497 - Premium OTO, done-with-you"
"$997+ - Mid-ticket, group programs"

A single descending diagonal accent line in bright cyan from upper-right to lower-left, suggesting upward progression.

BOTTOM CAPTION: "Charm pricing (ending in 7) outperforms round numbers below $497. Round numbers signal authority above."

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Price values ($7, $17, etc): massive bold sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4
- Threshold names: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Steps: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo, getting wider as they ascend
- Bottom caption: small italic medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white panel

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no money imagery, no real ladder graphic, no stairs.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K pricing threshold graphic.

page-anatomy-card.prompt:
Editorial reference card showing the layout anatomy of the 4 critical funnel pages (squeeze, sales, OTO, thank-you), arranged as 2x2 mockup outlines. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Page Anatomy: Squeeze, Sales, OTO, Thank-You"

2x2 grid of stylized page mockups. Each mockup is a vertical rounded rectangle (representing a page) with section dividers showing the layout structure as labeled bands.

Mockup 1 (top-left): Header pill "SQUEEZE"
Label sections from top to bottom inside the page mockup: "Headline (8-12 words)", "Sub-headline (10-18 words)", "3 outcome bullets", "Email-only form", "CTA button"
Footer: "8-15% cold, 25-45% warm CR target"

Mockup 2 (top-right): Header pill "SALES (TRIPWIRE)"
Sections: "Hook headline (8-14 words)", "Problem amplification (200-400w)", "Unique mechanism", "Proof stack", "Value stack with $$", "Guarantee", "CTA x3"
Footer: "1.5-3% cold, 4-8% warm CR target. 1,800-3,500 word count."

Mockup 3 (bottom-left): Header pill "OTO"
Sections: "Wait headline (6-10 words)", "Reframe (40-80 words)", "Value stack", "Bonuses (1-3)", "Price anchor", "One-click YES", "Smaller no-thanks link"
Footer: "600-1,200 word count"

Mockup 4 (bottom-right): Header pill "THANK-YOU"
Sections: "Headline + fulfillment link", "Subheadline", "45-90s welcome video", "Single CTA next action"
Footer: "ONE CTA only. Drives the next action."

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Mockup pill headers: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Section labels inside mockups: small medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Section dividers: thin off-white horizontal lines
- Footer notes: small italic, slate #1E293B inside off-white sub-panel

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.
MOCKUP PAGE BACKGROUNDS: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo fills, like wireframe page outlines.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no real screenshots, no specific brand styling.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K page anatomy reference.

seven-day-email-sequence.prompt:
Editorial timeline graphic showing the 7-day low-ticket buyer email sequence with subjects per day. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 7-Day Low-Ticket Buyer Sequence"
SUBTITLE: "Welcome emails draw 998% greater click rate. Buyer is hottest in first 72 hours."

A horizontal timeline with 6 day-marker stops (Day 0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7), each with a small card above showing the subject line.

Day 0: Subject card: "You are in. Here is your [product]."
Day 1: Subject card: "[First name], the first 10-minute win"
Day 2: Subject card: "Why I built [product] (origin story)"
Day 3: Subject card: "Real before-and-after from [customer name]"
Day 5: Subject card: "Here is why this is not working for some people"
Day 7: Subject card: "Ready for the next step?"

BELOW THE TIMELINE: a small extension showing "Day 30 → continuity", "Day 60 → workshop invite", "Day 90 → high-ticket pitch"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Day labels (Day 0, 1, etc): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 below each marker
- Subject cards: small medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF inside cyan-outlined rounded rectangles above the timeline
- Extension labels: small italic, slate #1E293B inside off-white panels
- Timeline horizontal line: thick bright cyan with dot markers at each day stop

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no email envelope icons, no clock icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K email sequence timeline.

common-failures-grid.prompt:
Editorial reference card showing the 10 most common 2026 low-ticket funnel failures, arranged as a 5x2 numbered grid. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "10 Common 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Failures"

5 columns x 2 rows.

ROW 1:
01 "No bump or upsell (math fails)"
02 "Front-end as profit not acquisition"
03 "Cold straight to sales page"
04 "Underpricing the OTO"
05 "Generic product, no source segmentation"

ROW 2:
06 "Continuity with hidden terms"
07 "iOS attribution paralysis"
08 "60-second access friction"
09 "Over-stuffed Hormozi-style stacks"
10 "Skipping the welcome sequence"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Card numbers: large condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 (01, 02, etc)
- Failure names: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.
CARD BACKGROUNDS: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no warning icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K failure reference grid.
